## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Hotel Engine to discuss content strategy and performance](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows strong growth in clicks (20% increase) and LLM referrals (75% increase over 12 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [New content strategy focuses on expense management, industry-specific solutions, and an FAQ/glossary experiment](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Hotel Engine card product launch timeline accelerated; public waitlist coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2782.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Review

  - [Clicks up significantly over last 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Impressions increased overall, despite mid-September drop](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic continuing to climb (e.g., 9,000% growth for Claude AI)](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [2,000 sessions from net new content with good engagement rate](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Average position declined, but clicks increased by 20%](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Expense and financial management content performing best (43% growth over 3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Hotel Engine currently ranked 4th behind two major competitors in LLM citations](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Goal: Improve Hotel Engine's presence in conversations and LLM citations](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Focus on specific pain points and industry solutions to differentiate from competitors](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)

### New Content Strategy

1.  Expense Management Focus:
    
      - [Triple down on spend management content cluster](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [Highlight administrative challenges of month-end processes](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
      - [Emphasize policy enforcement capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [Discuss flexibility tax and refund/credit handling](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)

2.  Industry-Specific Travel Solutions:
    
      - [Continue focus on construction and field services](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
      - [Explore energy/oil/gas and healthcare industries](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
      - [Potentially address sports teams' travel needs](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
      - [Incorporate case studies and testimonials for credibility](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)

3.  FAQ/Glossary Experiment:
    
      - [Create individual pages for frequently asked questions](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
      - [Target long-tail keywords and LLM traffic](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2376.0)
      - [Incorporate case study references and CTAs within answers](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2533.0)
      - [Develop as a separate collection with custom components](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2415.0)

### Hotel Engine Card Product Update

  - [Launch timeline accelerated](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2782.0)
  - [Public waitlist to be introduced soon](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2782.0)
  - [Opportunity to create comparative content without directly naming competitors](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2840.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Joel to ask sales team about top industries and pull GBV data by industry](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
  - [Joel to set up FAQ/glossary collection in Webflow and create basic wireframe](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2653.0)
  - [Carrie to start researching and developing topics for new content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=3045.0)
  - [Team to cancel next week's meeting due to Joel's offsite and time off](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
  - [Carrie to follow up on specific product differentiators and battle cards for competitive content](https://fathom.video/share/-Z-9APhaDKWGM83D_tWErFipRWGzZk9k?tab=summary&timestamp=2956.0)
